title: stelis creodantha
intro: Stelis creodantha, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis creodantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction by boiling its roots and leaves in water to create herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
